notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; local rules are used only as fallback.

articles.title: What would it mean for Ukraine if it actually starts producing Patriot missiles?
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 本文探讨了美国允许乌克兰生产爱国者导弹的潜在影响，分析了这一决定对乌克兰防御能力和地缘政治格局的意义。值得阅读，因为它揭示了军事技术转让与国际冲突动态的关键变化。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：乌克兰获得导弹生产能力可能改变战场平衡，但实际效果取决于技术转移速度、供应链稳定性和国际政治支持。

en.summary: This article examines the implications of the US granting Ukraine permission to produce Patriot missiles, analyzing how this could affect Ukraine's defense capabilities and the geopolitical landscape. It is worth reading as it highlights a significant shift in military technology transfer and conflict dynamics.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Ukraine's ability to produce Patriot missiles could alter battlefield dynamics, but actual impact depends on technology transfer speed, supply chain stability, and international political support.
en.title: What Would Patriot Missile Production Mean for Ukraine?

articles.title: First patients enrolled in record-breaking Ebola treatment trial in DRC
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 刚果（金）埃博拉疫情暴发后仅六周，一项创纪录速度启动的治疗试验已开始招募首批患者。两种试验性药物正在伊图里省进行测试，有望在数月内降低死亡率。该试验的快速启动体现了全球卫生应急响应的重大进步。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：在公共卫生危机中，快速启动临床试验是可行的，但需依赖国际协调和当地医疗体系的配合。

en.summary: Just six weeks after the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo was declared a public health emergency, a treatment trial has enrolled its first patients at record speed. Two experimental drugs are being tested in the Ituri region, with hopes of reducing mortality within months. This rapid setup marks a significant advance in global health emergency response.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Rapid clinical trials in public health crises are feasible but require international coordination and local healthcare system support.
en.title: Record-Breaking Ebola Treatment Trial Begins in DRC

articles.title: Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people, officials say
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.summary: 曼谷一家酒吧发生火灾，造成至少27人死亡。现场视频显示火势猛烈，浓烟从门口涌出。这起事件突显了公共场所消防安全的重要性。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：酒吧火灾导致重大伤亡，提醒关注娱乐场所的安全隐患。

en.summary: A fire broke out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people. Footage shows a huge blaze and smoke pouring from the entrance. This incident underscores the critical need for fire safety in public venues.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: The pub fire caused significant casualties, highlighting safety risks in entertainment venues.
en.title: Fire at Bangkok Pub Kills at Least 27

articles.title: DietrichGebert/ponytail
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目提出一种让AI代理模仿“最懒资深开发者”思维的方法，强调不写代码才是最佳实践。它因高星标和独特理念值得关注，可能启发更高效的AI辅助开发范式。
articles.failureAnalysis: 核心矛盾在于“懒惰”与“可靠”难以兼得，实际部署中可能因过度简化导致代码质量下降或遗漏关键逻辑。项目缺乏具体实现细节和验证数据，难以评估其真实效果和工程可行性。依赖开发者主观判断“何时不写代码”，缺乏客观标准，可能引发团队协作混乱。

en.summary: This project proposes a method to make AI agents mimic the mindset of the laziest senior developer, emphasizing that the best code is the one never written. It is worth reading for its unique approach and high GitHub stars, potentially inspiring more efficient AI-assisted development paradigms.
en.failureAnalysis: The core contradiction between 'laziness' and 'reliability' is hard to reconcile; in practice, oversimplification may degrade code quality or miss critical logic. The project lacks implementation details and validation data, making it difficult to assess its real-world effectiveness and engineering feasibility.
en.title: Ponytail: AI Agent That Thinks Like a Lazy Senior Dev

articles.title: Directly Responsible Individuals (DRI)
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: No clear evidence
articles.summary: 本文介绍了“直接负责人”（DRI）的概念，即对项目成败最终负责的个人，源自苹果公司。作者强调，在AI代理日益普及的背景下，DRI必须由人类担任，因为机器无法承担真正的责任。文章引用IBM 1979年的观点，指出计算机永远不能负责管理决策，这为AI在组织中的角色划定了清晰边界。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：即使AI代理能高效执行任务，人类仍需作为最终责任人，确保问责制的完整性。

en.summary: This article defines 'Directly Responsible Individuals' (DRI) as the person ultimately accountable for a project's success or failure, a concept originating from Apple. The author argues that DRI must always be human, not AI agents, because machines cannot take accountability. It cites IBM's 1979 training slide to reinforce that computers should never make management decisions.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Even as AI agents become more capable, humans must remain the final accountable party to preserve accountability in organizations.
en.title: Directly Responsible Individuals (DRI) and AI Agents

articles.title: Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China: A Landscape Analysis of Investigator-Initiated Trials, Registered Clinical Trials, and Regulatory Approval
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 脑损伤（如中风、脊髓损伤）导致很多人失去运动或交流能力，现有治疗方法效果有限。脑机接口（BCI）能帮助恢复这些功能，但如何从实验室研究真正变成医院里能用的产品，在中国缺乏系统性的分析。
paperCard.method: 作者从三个来源收集数据：中国临床试验注册中心（ChiCTR）的134项试验、26项研究者发起的试验（IITs）、以及国家药监局（NMPA）批准的5个产品。他们按技术类型（非侵入式、半侵入式、侵入式等）、疾病类型、地理位置等分类统计，并用图表展示趋势。
paperCard.difference: 之前的综述通常只关注单一技术或疾病，而且数据较旧。这篇论文首次把中国BCI的“研究者试验→注册临床试验→产品获批”三个环节放在一起分析，覆盖了2023-2026年的最新进展，包括全球首个获批的半侵入式BCI。
paperCard.innovation: 创新在于提供了一个完整的“翻译生态系统”量化分析，不仅统计了试验数量，还梳理了政策推动（如“十四五”规划）、监管路径（如创新医疗器械特别审查程序），以及不同技术路线（非侵入、侵入、闭环神经调控等）的成熟度对比。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现分三步：1）用关键词在ChiCTR搜索并筛选出134项临床试验；2）通过PubMed、机构网站等收集26项IITs；3）从NMPA数据库获取5个获批产品信息。关键技术词如“ECoG”（皮层脑电图，一种半侵入式信号采集方法）、“闭环神经调控”（系统能实时监测大脑信号并自动调整刺激）、“ChiCTR”（中国临床试验注册中心，类似中国的临床试验数据库）。
paperCard.applications: 主要应用场景包括：中风后康复训练（用非侵入式EEG控制外骨骼或机器人）、脊髓损伤患者的运动恢复（用侵入式电极控制机械臂）、语言障碍患者的交流（解码脑信号生成文字或语音）、癫痫的闭环神经刺激治疗（实时监测并抑制异常放电）。
technicalTerms: BCI（脑机接口）：直接在大脑和外部设备之间建立通信通道的技术。
非侵入式：不需要开颅手术，像戴帽子一样用头皮电极采集脑电信号。
半侵入式：电极放在大脑皮层表面（硬脑膜下或上），需要小手术但创伤比全植入小。
侵入式：电极直接插入大脑组织，信号质量最高但风险也最大。
ECoG（皮层脑电图）：一种半侵入式方法，电极直接贴在脑皮层表面记录电信号。
闭环神经调控：系统能实时读取大脑信号，并根据信号自动调整电刺激参数。
ChiCTR：中国临床试验注册中心，所有在中国进行的临床试验都需要在这里登记。
NMPA：中国国家药品监督管理局，负责审批医疗设备。
IIT（研究者发起的试验）：由医生或研究机构自己发起的小规模试验，通常用于早期探索。

articles.summary: 这篇论文首次系统分析了中国脑机接口（BCI）从早期临床试验到产品获批的全链条现状，包括134项注册临床试验、26项研究者发起的试验和5个获批产品。它揭示了非侵入式BCI占主导、中风康复是主要应用方向，以及中国在2020年后临床试验数量快速增长的趋势。值得一读是因为它提供了中国BCI领域最全面的量化数据，帮助理解技术从实验室走向医院的真实路径和挑战。
articles.failureAnalysis: 论文指出长期植入稳定性、临床基础设施标准化和解码算法的通用性仍是关键障碍。数据截止到2026年6月，可能无法反映之后的最新进展。

en.summary: This paper provides the first quantitative analysis of China's BCI translational ecosystem, covering 134 registered clinical trials, 26 investigator-initiated trials, and 5 approved products. It reveals that non-invasive systems dominate (79.1%), stroke rehabilitation is the leading application (65.0%), and clinical trial registrations have surged since 2020. It is worth reading for its comprehensive data on how BCI technologies move from research to clinical practice in China.
en.failureAnalysis: Key barriers include long-term implant stability, lack of standardized clinical workflows, and limited generalizability of decoding algorithms. The data only covers up to June 2026, so recent developments may be missing.
en.title: Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China: A Landscape Analysis of Investigator-Initiated Trials, Registered Clinical Trials, and Regulatory Approval

paperCard.problem: Neurological injuries like stroke and spinal cord injury cause permanent motor or communication deficits. Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) offer a way to restore these functions, but there is no systematic analysis of how BCI technologies are translated from research to approved medical products in China.
paperCard.method: The authors collected data from three sources: 134 clinical trials from the Chinese Clinical Trial Registry (ChiCTR), 26 investigator-initiated trials (IITs) from PubMed and institutional websites, and 5 NMPA-approved products. They categorized trials by technology type (non-invasive, semi-invasive, invasive), indication, and geography, and analyzed trends over time.
paperCard.difference: Previous reviews focused on single technologies or diseases and used older data. This paper is the first to integrate all three stages of translation (IITs → registered trials → approved products) and covers the latest advances from 2023-2026, including the world's first approved semi-invasive BCI.
paperCard.innovation: The innovation is a complete quantitative landscape of China's BCI translation pipeline, including policy drivers (e.g., 14th Five-Year Plan), regulatory pathways (e.g., Innovative Medical Device Special Review), and a comparison of different technology routes (non-invasive, invasive, closed-loop neuromodulation).
paperCard.implementation: Implementation involved three steps: 1) Searching ChiCTR with keywords to identify 134 eligible trials; 2) Compiling 26 IITs from PubMed, CNKI, and institutional reports; 3) Extracting 5 approved products from the NMPA database. Key technical terms include 'ECoG' (electrocorticography, a semi-invasive method that records brain signals from the cortex surface), 'closed-loop neuromodulation' (a system that monitors brain signals in real time and adjusts stimulation automatically), and 'ChiCTR' (China's clinical trial registry).
paperCard.applications: Main applications include: stroke rehabilitation (using non-invasive EEG to control exoskeletons or robots), motor recovery for spinal cord injury (using invasive electrodes to control robotic arms), communication for speech-impaired patients (decoding brain signals into text or speech), and closed-loop stimulation for epilepsy (monitoring and suppressing abnormal brain activity).
technicalTerms: BCI (Brain-Computer Interface): A technology that creates a direct communication pathway between the brain and an external device.
Non-invasive: No surgery required; electrodes are placed on the scalp like a cap.
Semi-invasive: Electrodes are placed on the surface of the brain (under or on the dura), requiring minor surgery but less risk than full implantation.
Invasive: Electrodes are inserted directly into brain tissue, providing the highest signal quality but also the highest risk.
ECoG (Electrocorticography): A semi-invasive method where electrodes are placed directly on the brain's cortex to record electrical signals.
Closed-loop neuromodulation: A system that reads brain signals in real time and automatically adjusts electrical stimulation parameters.
ChiCTR: Chinese Clinical Trial Registry, where all clinical trials in China must be registered.
NMPA: National Medical Products Administration, China's regulatory agency for medical devices.
IIT (Investigator-Initiated Trial): A small-scale trial initiated by a doctor or research institution, typically for early exploration.

articles.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 现有深度学习模型在脑电情绪识别时，把不同情绪类别当作完全独立、等距离的标签，忽略了情绪之间在心理学上的相似性（比如“恐惧”和“悲伤”比“恐惧”和“快乐”更接近）。这导致模型会犯一些不合理的错误，比如把“快乐”误判为“悲伤”。
paperCard.method: 论文提出一个图正则化框架，首先根据情绪心理学理论（如Russell的环状模型）构建一个情绪图，图中相邻节点代表心理上相近的情绪。然后引入三种正则化方法（图标签平滑、图拉普拉斯损失、切片Wasserstein距离），在训练时惩罚那些违反情绪拓扑结构的预测，让模型学会更合理的分类。
paperCard.difference: 之前的方法主要关注特征提取（如CNN、Transformer），并使用标准的交叉熵损失，对所有误分类一视同仁。这篇论文首次系统地将情绪之间的心理拓扑结构整合到训练目标中，让模型知道“混淆相近情绪”比“混淆远距离情绪”更可接受。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点在于：1）提出情绪图构建方法，将心理学理论转化为可计算的图结构；2）引入三种不同复杂度的图正则化策略，分别从软标签、谱图理论和最优传输角度实现；3）提出“邻近违规率”指标，量化模型是否做出心理学上合理的误分类；4）验证了该方法在三种不同架构（Transformer、CNN-Transformer混合、图神经网络）上均有效，具有架构无关性。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现分三步：1）根据情绪在效价-唤醒二维空间中的坐标，构建情绪图（如SEED-IV中Happy只连接Neutral，Sad和Fear相连）；2）在训练时，除了标准交叉熵损失，还加入图正则化损失，惩罚模型预测与情绪图拓扑不一致的情况；3）使用固定权重或自适应权重（基于不确定性）来平衡两个损失。三种正则化方法中，图标签平滑最简单（O(K)），图拉普拉斯损失中等（O(K²)），切片Wasserstein距离最复杂（O(BLK log K)），但都适用于小类别数。
paperCard.applications: 可应用于：1）心理健康监测（如追踪情绪变化辅助治疗）；2）情感脑机接口（如消费级脑电设备Muse、Emotiv上的情绪识别）；3）任何需要利用类别间结构关系的分类任务（如医学诊断中的疾病分级）。
technicalTerms: 图正则化：在模型训练时加入一个惩罚项，让模型预测符合预设的图结构（比如情绪之间的相似关系）。
交叉熵损失：一种常用的分类损失函数，衡量模型预测与真实标签的差异，但默认把所有类别视为独立。
环状模型：一种情绪心理学理论，认为情绪在“效价”（愉悦度）和“唤醒度”两个维度上呈环形分布。
邻近违规率：衡量模型误分类中，有多少是跨情绪距离较远的错误（如Happy→Sad），越低说明模型越合理。

articles.summary: 这篇论文提出了一种图正则化深度学习框架，用于基于脑电信号的情绪识别。它通过将情绪类别构建成图结构，并引入三种正则化策略，让模型在训练时考虑情绪之间的心理相似性，从而提升识别准确率并减少不合理的误分类。值得阅读是因为它提供了一种架构无关的通用方法，能显著提升现有模型的性能上限。
articles.failureAnalysis: 主要局限在于实验仅在两个数据集（SEED-IV和SEED-V）上进行，且情绪类别数较少（4-5类），对于更大规模的情绪分类任务，计算复杂度可能成为瓶颈。

en.summary: This paper proposes a graph-regularized deep learning framework for EEG-based emotion recognition. It constructs emotion graphs based on psychological theories and introduces three regularization strategies to penalize predictions that violate the emotion topology, improving accuracy and reducing psychologically implausible misclassifications. It is worth reading because it provides an architecture-agnostic method that consistently boosts performance across different backbones.
en.failureAnalysis: The main limitation is that experiments are only conducted on two datasets with small label sets (4-5 classes), and computational complexity may become a bottleneck for larger emotion taxonomies.
en.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure

paperCard.problem: Existing deep learning models treat emotion categories as isolated and equidistant labels, ignoring their psychological interdependencies (e.g., Fear is closer to Sad than to Happy). This leads to unreasonable misclassifications like confusing Happy with Sad.
paperCard.method: The paper proposes a graph-regularized framework. First, an emotion graph is built based on dimensional emotion theories (e.g., Russell's circumplex model), where edges encode psychological proximity. Then, three regularization strategies (Graph Label Smoothing, Graph Laplacian loss, Sliced Wasserstein distance) are introduced to penalize predictions that deviate from the emotion topology during training.
paperCard.difference: Previous methods focus on feature extraction and use standard cross-entropy loss, treating all misclassifications equally. This paper systematically integrates emotion topology into the training objective, teaching the model that confusing adjacent emotions is more acceptable than confusing distant ones.
paperCard.innovation: Innovations include: 1) constructing emotion graphs from psychological theory; 2) introducing three complementary regularization strategies from different mathematical traditions; 3) proposing a Proximity Violation metric to quantify psychologically plausible errors; 4) demonstrating architecture-agnostic benefits across Transformer, CNN-Transformer hybrid, and GNN backbones.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation steps: 1) Build emotion graph based on valence-arousal coordinates (e.g., Happy only connects to Neutral, Sad and Fear are connected); 2) Add graph regularization loss to standard cross-entropy loss during training, penalizing predictions that violate graph topology; 3) Use fixed or adaptive weighting to balance losses. GLS is simplest (O(K)), GL is moderate (O(K²)), SW is most complex (O(BLK log K)) but all are efficient for small K.
paperCard.applications: Applications include: 1) mental health monitoring (tracking emotional trajectories for treatment); 2) affective brain-computer interfaces (consumer EEG devices); 3) any classification task with structured label relationships (e.g., disease severity grading).
technicalTerms: graph regularization: adding a penalty during training to enforce model predictions to respect a predefined graph structure (e.g., emotion similarities).
cross-entropy loss: a standard classification loss that measures difference between predicted and true labels, but treats all classes as independent.
circumplex model: a psychological theory that arranges emotions in a circular space defined by valence (pleasure) and arousal (intensity).
Proximity Violation: a metric measuring how many misclassifications are between distant emotion nodes (e.g., Happy→Sad), lower is better.
